'''旧暦5月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[霊亀]]2年（[[716年]]_月_日） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2年（[[1571年]]_月_日） - [[織田信長]]が[[伊勢長島一向一揆]]の拠点・願証寺を攻撃。[[氏家卜全]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4年（[[1792年]]_月_日） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[中外新聞]]が上野彰義隊事件の戦況を『別段中外新聞』で報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * （[[226年]]_月_日） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝・[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[天正]]3年（[[1575年]]_月_日） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]] * [[元和]]9年（[[1623年]]_月_日） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月15日 (旧暦)|5月15日]] 翌日[[5月17日 (旧暦)|5月17日]] - 前月[[4月16日 (旧暦)|4月16日]] 翌月[[6月16日 (旧暦)|6月16日]] *新暦[[5月16日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[霊亀]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[716年]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1571年]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・願証寺を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1792年]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月5日]]） - [[中外新聞]]が上野彰義隊事件の戦況を『別段中外新聞』で報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1666年]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[黄初]]7年（ユリウス暦[[226年]][[6月28日]]） - [[曹丕]]（文帝）、[[魏 (三国)|魏]]の初代皇帝・[[曹操]]の子（* [[187年]]） * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540年]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1623年]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1666年]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540年]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1623年]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1807年]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

== Deaths == * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540年]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1623年]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1807年]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

--> == Events == * [[霊亀]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[716年]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1571年]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1792年]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * [[寛文]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1666年]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540年]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1623年]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1807年]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[霊亀]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[716]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1571]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1792]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]

[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[霊亀]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[716]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1571]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1792]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * [[寛文]]6th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1666]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720]]） * [[延享]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1744]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1575]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1623]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1807]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[霊亀]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[716]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1571]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1792]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * [[寛文]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1666]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720]]） * [[延享]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1744]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1575]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1623]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1807]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[霊亀]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[716]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1571]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1792]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * [[寛文]]6th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1666]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720]]） * [[延享]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1744]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]3rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1575]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1623]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1807]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.comment: doing mass replacement for all western dates to english
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[元亀]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[6月10日]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[元亀]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[6月8日]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[7月4日]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[7月5日]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[6月18日]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[6月24日]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[6月13日]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[6月21日]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

[[sn:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

revision.comment: Fixing the qq replacement as it causes problems in a lot of pages
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、[[儒学者]] （* [[1734]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者}}" to "{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[織田信長]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[武士]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[織田信長]]" to "[[Oda Nobunaga]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）

[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|天正}}" to "|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）

[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[zh:五月十六]] [[en:draft:May 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} （* [[1734]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[716]] [[June 10]] ） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]] を設置 * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1571]] [[June 8]] ） - [[Oda Nobunaga]] が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]] の拠点・[[願証寺]] を攻撃。[[氏家直元]] ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[Kansei]] 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1792]] [[July 4]] ） - [[林子平]] の著書『[[海国兵談]] 』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 5]] ） - 『[[中外新聞]] 』が[[上野戦争]] の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1666]] [[June 18]] ） - [[間部詮房]] 、[[越後]] [[村上藩]] 初代藩主、[[側用人]] （+ [[1720]] ） * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1744]] [[June 26]] ） - [[水野忠鼎]] 、第2代[[唐津藩]] 主（+ [[1818]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1575]] [[June 24]] ） - [[鳥居強右衛門]] 、[[Samurai]] （* [[1540]] ） * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1623]] [[June 13]] ） - [[本因坊算砂]] 、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]] （* [[1559]] ） * [[Bunka]] 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1807]] [[June 21]] ） - [[皆川淇園]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} （* [[1734]] ）

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[716]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡}}. * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1571]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Chōshū Ikki|ja|長島一向一揆}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujige Naomoto|ja|氏家直元}}. * [[Kansei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1792]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[Keiō]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1666]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}}) – {{ill|Mamabe Senbō|ja|間部詮房}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[1720]]). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1744]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[1818]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1575]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Torii Qiyūemon|ja|鳥居強右衛門}}, a samurai (born [[1540]]). * [[Genna]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1623]] {{ill|June 13|ja|6月13日}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|ja|本因坊算砂}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[1559]]). * [[Bunka]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1807]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}}) (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]]

== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[716]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡}}. * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1571]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Chōshū Ikki|ja|長島一向一揆}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujige Naomoto|ja|氏家直元}}. * [[Kansei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1792]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[Keiō]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1666]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日}}) – {{ill|Mamabe Senbō|ja|間部詮房}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[1720]]). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1744]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[1818]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1575]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日}}) – {{ill|Torii Qiyūemon|ja|鳥居強右衛門}}, a samurai (born [[1540]]). * [[Genna]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1623]] {{ill|June 13|ja|6月13日}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|ja|本因坊算砂}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[1559]]). * [[Bunka]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1807]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}}) (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[716]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=draft}}. * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1571]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Chōshū Ikki|ja|長島一向一揆|12=draft}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=draft}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujige Naomoto|ja|氏家直元|12=draft}}. * [[Kansei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1792]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[Keiō]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1666]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mamabe Senbō|ja|間部詮房|12=draft}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[1720]]). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1744]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=draft}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[1818]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1575]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Torii Qiyūemon|ja|鳥居強右衛門|12=draft}}, a samurai (born [[1540]]). * [[Genna]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1623]] {{ill|June 13|ja|6月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|ja|本因坊算砂|12=draft}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[1559]]). * [[Bunka]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1807]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

== Events == * {{ill|Reiki|ja|霊亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[716]] {{ill|June 10|ja|6月10日|12=draft}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=draft}}. * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1571]] {{ill|June 8|ja|6月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Chōshū Ikki|ja|長島一向一揆|12=draft}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=draft}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujige Naomoto|ja|氏家直元|12=draft}}. * [[Kansei]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1792]] {{ill|July 4|ja|7月4日|12=draft}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[Keiō]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1666]] {{ill|June 18|ja|6月18日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mamabe Senbō|ja|間部詮房|12=draft}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[1720]]). * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1744]] {{ill|June 26|ja|6月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=draft}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[1818]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1575]] {{ill|June 24|ja|6月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Torii Qiyūemon|ja|鳥居強右衛門|12=draft}}, a samurai (born [[1540]]). * [[Genna]] 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1623]] {{ill|June 13|ja|6月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|ja|本因坊算砂|12=draft}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[1559]]). * [[Bunka]] 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1807]] {{ill|June 21|ja|6月21日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}}) (born [[1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]]

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2023年2月18日 (土) 05:52 (UTC)}}{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月16日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[霊亀]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[716年]][[6月10日]]） - 東国の高句麗人1799人を武蔵に移し[[高麗郡]]を設置 * [[元亀]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1571年]][[6月8日]]） - [[織田信長]]が伊勢[[長島一向一揆]]の拠点・[[願証寺]]を攻撃。[[氏家直元]]ら多くの戦死者を出し敗退 * [[寛政]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1792年]][[7月4日]]） - [[林子平]]の著書『[[海国兵談]]』が発禁。子平は禁錮に * [[慶応|慶應]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月5日]]） - 『[[中外新聞]]』が[[上野戦争]]の戦況を『別段中外新聞』として報道。日本初の[[号外]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛文]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1666年]][[6月18日]]） - [[間部詮房]]、[[越後]][[村上藩]]初代藩主、[[側用人]]（+ [[1720年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[6月26日]]） - [[水野忠鼎]]、第2代[[唐津藩]]主（+ [[1818年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1575年]][[6月24日]]） - [[鳥居強右衛門]]、[[武士]]（* [[1540年]]） * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1623年]][[6月13日]]） - [[本因坊算砂]]、囲碁棋士・初代[[本因坊]]（* [[1559年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1807年]][[6月21日]]） - [[皆川淇園]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1734年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|qq=|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|qq=|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|qq=|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|qq=|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|qq=|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|qq=|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十六]] {{wikidata link|Q839633}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
