<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839633]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Reiki (era)|Reiki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:716|716]] [[:en:June 10|June 10]]) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * [[:en:Genki (era)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:June 8|June 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based [[:en:Sieges of Nagashima|Chōshū Ikki]] at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by [[:en:Ujiie Naomoto|Ujige Naomoto]]. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1792|1792]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1666|1666]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Manabe Akifusa|Mamabe Senbō]], the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died [[:en:1720|1720]]). * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1744|1744]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died [[:en:1818|1818]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1575|1575]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Torii Suneemon|Torii Qiyūemon]], a samurai (born [[:en:1540|1540]]). * [[:en:Genna|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1623|1623]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hon'inbō Sansa|Hon'inbō Sansa]], an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born [[:en:1559|1559]]). * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1807|1807]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born [[:en:1734|1734]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|716|en|716|WD=Q23531|lt=716}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * {{ill|Genki (era)|en|Genki (era)|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Sieges of Nagashima|en|Sieges of Nagashima|WD=Q1073030|lt=Chōshū Ikki}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujiie Naomoto|en|Ujiie Naomoto|WD=Q7878198|lt=Ujige Naomoto}}. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1792|en|1792|WD=Q7805|lt=1792}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|WD=Q2456|lt=March 26}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|WD=Q7585|lt=1666}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akifusa|en|Manabe Akifusa|WD=Q6746560|lt=Mamabe Senbō}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|WD=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died {{ill|1818|en|1818|WD=Q6964|lt=1818}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – {{ill|Torii Suneemon|en|Torii Suneemon|WD=Q2337176|lt=Torii Qiyūemon}}, a samurai (born {{ill|1540|en|1540|WD=Q6482|lt=1540}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|en|Hon'inbō Sansa|WD=Q2656780|lt=Hon'inbō Sansa}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|WD=Q6909|lt=1807}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1734|en|1734|WD=Q6977|lt=1734}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|WD=Q7585|lt=1666}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akifusa|en|Manabe Akifusa|WD=Q6746560|lt=Mamabe Senbō}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|WD=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died {{ill|1818|en|1818|WD=Q6964|lt=1818}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – {{ill|Torii Suneemon|en|Torii Suneemon|WD=Q2337176|lt=Torii Qiyūemon}}, a samurai (born {{ill|1540|en|1540|WD=Q6482|lt=1540}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|en|Hon'inbō Sansa|WD=Q2656780|lt=Hon'inbō Sansa}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|WD=Q6909|lt=1807}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1734|en|1734|WD=Q6977|lt=1734}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十六]][[zh:五月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|May 16|qq=May 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Reiki (era)|en|Reiki (era)|WD=Q1373115|lt=Reiki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|716|en|716|WD=Q23531|lt=716}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|WD=Q2615|lt=June 10}}) – The Eastern court relocated 1,799 people of Goguryeo origin to Musashi and established the {{ill|Kōrai-gun|ja|高麗郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōrai-gun|1=Koma district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11673318}}. * {{ill|Genki (era)|en|Genki (era)|WD=Q1145064|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|WD=Q2621|lt=June 8}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} attacked the stronghold of the Ise-based {{ill|Sieges of Nagashima|en|Sieges of Nagashima|WD=Q1073030|lt=Chōshū Ikki}} at {{ill|Ganshōji|ja|願証寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ganshōji|1=Ganshōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11665171}}, suffering heavy losses led by {{ill|Ujiie Naomoto|en|Ujiie Naomoto|WD=Q7878198|lt=Ujige Naomoto}}. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1792|en|1792|WD=Q7805|lt=1792}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4}}) – The publication of Hayashikodaira's work, 【Kaikoku Heidan】, was banned; its author, Hayashikodaira, was subsequently imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|WD=Q2456|lt=March 26}}) – The British Minister of Foreign Affairs, reported as part of the 【Chūgoku Shinbun】 (later published as a special extra) covering the events of the restoration.
== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|WD=Q7585|lt=1666}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akifusa|en|Manabe Akifusa|WD=Q6746560|lt=Mamabe Senbō}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|WD=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died {{ill|1818|en|1818|WD=Q6964|lt=1818}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24}}) – {{ill|Torii Suneemon|en|Torii Suneemon|WD=Q2337176|lt=Torii Qiyūemon}}, a samurai (born {{ill|1540|en|1540|WD=Q6482|lt=1540}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|en|Hon'inbō Sansa|WD=Q2656780|lt=Hon'inbō Sansa}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|WD=Q6909|lt=1807}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1734|en|1734|WD=Q6977|lt=1734}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|15|5|17|4|16|6|5|0516|qq=}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1666|en|1666|WD=Q7585|lt=1666|1=1666}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18|1=June 18}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akifusa|en|Manabe Akifusa|WD=Q6746560|lt=Mamabe Senbō|1=Manabe Akifusa}}, the first lord of the Murakami Domain in Echigo (died {{ill|1720|en|1720|WD=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|WD=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744|1=1744}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26|1=June 26}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadayoshi|ja|水野忠鼎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuno Tadayoshi|1=Mizuno Tadakane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10565568}}, the second lord of the Karatsu Domain (died {{ill|1818|en|1818|WD=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1575|en|1575|WD=Q6688|lt=1575|1=1575}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}}) – {{ill|Torii Suneemon|en|Torii Suneemon|WD=Q2337176|lt=Torii Qiyūemon|1=Torii Suneemon}}, a samurai (born {{ill|1540|en|1540|WD=Q6482|lt=1540|1=1540}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|WD=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|en|Hon'inbō Sansa|WD=Q2656780|lt=Hon'inbō Sansa|1=Hon'inbō Sansa}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|WD=Q6909|lt=1807|1=1807}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1734|en|1734|WD=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}}).

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1575|en|1575|qid=Q6688|lt=1575|1=1575}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|qid=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}}) – {{ill|Torii Suneemon|en|Torii Suneemon|qid=Q2337176|lt=Torii Qiyūemon|1=Torii Suneemon}}, a samurai (born {{ill|1540|en|1540|qid=Q6482|lt=1540|1=1540}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|qid=Q2614|lt=June 13|1=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hon'inbō Sansa|en|Hon'inbō Sansa|qid=Q2656780|lt=Hon'inbō Sansa|1=Hon'inbō Sansa}}, an accomplished go player and the first head of the Hon'inbō house (born {{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|qid=Q6909|lt=1807|1=1807}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|qid=Q2671|lt=June 21|1=June 21}}) – {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3196280}}, a Confucian scholar ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (born {{ill|1734|en|1734|qid=Q6977|lt=1734|1=1734}}).
